name: Mexican Buñuelos
method: Take a bowl, add salt, baking powder, and flour in it.
Add oil and warm water. Mix with your hands.
Make the dough and knead it for 8-10 minutes to make it smooth.
Cover it and set aside for 30 minutes.
Take a pan with frying oil in it and make a topping of cinnamon
Make balls from the dough, then shape them into circles.
Heat oil to 350 F, and fry each circle for 60 seconds, until it is golden
Remove any excess oil, and sprinkle cinnamon sugar topping.
